arts.ttl: Official: Changes aplenty as Real Madrid name XI to face Celta Vigo
arts.sum: The XI of players set to be depended upon by Real Madrid to get the better of Celta Vigo this evening has been unveiled online. And it showcases the fact…

arts.ttl: Why is Thibaut Courtois not playing for Real Madrid against Celta Vigo today in the Copa del Rey?
arts.sum: Real Madrid will be without first-choice goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois for their Copa del Rey game against Celta de Vigo on Thursday evening, as Ancelotti left him out of the squad. The game between Real Madrid and Celta will be played on Thursday January 16 at Santiago Bernabéu with kick off at 3:30 p.m. ET / 12:30 p.m. PT .

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Celta Vigo, 2025 Copa del Rey
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Celta Vigo in the Copa del Rey. This is an important game for Real Madrid after the discouraging loss to Barcelona in the Supercup Final, so it’s not shocking to see Ancelotti deploying a very strong starting lineup even if the Copa del Rey is never a priority for the club.

arts.ttl: Man United legend takes swipe at Kylian Mbappe and claims he should 'NEVER' be compared to Thierry Henry after struggles at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Madrid signed Mbappe from PSG for free in the summer to make him the star of the show but he has lagged behind Vinicius Junior, recording 17 goal contributions to the Brazilian's 23.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid ‘on the verge’ of deal for Joel Pleguezuelos
arts.sum: La Liga champions Real Madrid are all set to add to the club’s defensive ranks at youth level. That’s according to transfer insider Javier Rodríguez Pascual, who points towards Joel…

arts.ttl: Why Carlo Ancelotti was left ‘upset’ with one Real Madrid star before recent outing
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti was left less than impressed by the actions of defender Jesús Vallejo earlier this month. That’s according to Relevo, who have on Thursday provided…

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold contract latest: NO agreement with Real Madrid
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has not reached an agreement to join Real Madrid on a free transfer this summer, despite claims to the contrary in Spain this week. This season that has invariably involved their interest in Alexander-Arnold, and this week saw claims the right-back had now reached a verbal agreement to join on a free transfer at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Real Madrid-Celta Vigo: Carlo Ancelotti to go all-out for Copa del Rey clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Celta Vigo are both aiming to progress to the quarter-finals of the 2024-25 Copa del Rey, as the two teams prepare to face off at the Santiago Bernabeu on Thursday evening. Real Madrid will be aiming to bounce back from last weekend’s Spanish Super Cup humiliation against Barcelona, and Carlo Ancelotti is […] The post Predicted Teams Real Madrid-Celta Vigo: Carlo Ancelotti to go all-out for Copa del Rey clash appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: La Liga rival claims Real Madrid youngster ‘is getting fewer opportunities than he deserves’
arts.sum: Las Palmas star Sandro Ramírez has this week revealed his take that Real Madrid talent Raúl Asencio is deserving of a more regular chance to impress in Carlo Ancelotti’s backline.…
